info.title: Polpo API
info.description: REST API for the Polpo multi-agent orchestration framework. Manage projects, tasks, plans, agents, workflows, skills, notifications, and approvals.

bearerAuth.description: API key passed as a Bearer token. Configure via the apiKeys field in polpo.json or the POLPO_API_KEY environment variable.

get.summary: Get activity history for a task

delete.summary: Remove a skill from the pool

post.summary: Assign a skill to an agent

409.description: Already resolved or max rejections reached

get.summary: Get log entries for a session
